etymology.description: ťÖČ(ťÖČ) (y«íu, "wine; alcohol") + ū¶•Ď(ū¶•Ď) (h«éi, "minced meat") = pickled or preserved meat or fish in wine -> minced pickled meat
etymology.interpretation: The character combines ťÖČ(ťÖČ) (y«íu, "wine; alcohol") for its association with fermentation and preservation, with ū¶•Ď(ū¶•Ď) (h«éi, "minced meat"), representing the meat that is preserved. Together, they indicate meat minced and preserved in wine, which is a traditional method of preparing and preserving meat.
